description: Add explicit OpenCode Provider variant to the provider catalog as a fourth OpenCode tier, add an opencode-zen executor for proper routing, and ensure all four OpenCode variants (OpenCode Free, OpenCode Go, OpenCode Zen, and the new OpenCode Provider base tier) are clearly separated with distinct identities in the routing layer and provider config.
steps: 1. Add 'opencode-provider' entry in src/shared/constants/providers.ts under APIKEY_PROVIDERS with: id='opencode-provider', alias='ocp', name='OpenCode Provider', icon='terminal', color='#E87040', textIcon='OP', website='https://opencode.ai', notice describing it as the base paid OpenCode tier with access to core models. Make it distinct from opencode (free/oc), opencode-go (ocg), opencode-zen (ocz).

2. Add 'opencode-provider' entry in open-sse/config/providers.ts with baseUrl 'https://opencode.ai', format 'openai', headers including x-opencode-client. This is distinct from the free opencode entry which uses noAuth:true with Bearer 'public'.

3. Add 'opencode-provider' model list in open-sse/config/providerModels.ts with a curated subset of models appropriate for a base-tier subscription (e.g., deepseek-v4-flash, qwen3.6-plus, glm-5, kimi-k2.5, minimax-m2.5, mimo-v2-pro).

4. Create open-sse/executors/opencode-provider.ts extending BaseExecutor. It should route to https://opencode.ai/zen/provider/v1/chat/completions for OpenAI-format models, and /zen/provider/v1/messages for claude-format models (similar pattern to opencode-go.ts). Auth via Bearer token from credentials.apiKey.
5. Register the new executor in open-sse/executors/index.ts: import OpenCodeProviderExecutor and add to the executors map as 'opencode-provider'.
6. Add 'opencode-provider' to the OAUTH_ALIASES map in open-sse/config/providerModels.ts with alias 'opencode-provider'.

7. Create open-sse/executors/opencode-zen.ts extending BaseExecutor. Currently opencode-zen falls through to DefaultExecutor which may not handle the zen API surface correctly. Create a dedicated executor that routes to https://opencode.ai/zen/v1/chat/completions for openai-format and /zen/v1/messages for claude-format models, with proper Bearer token auth.

9. Add tests/unit/opencode-provider-variants.test.ts verifying: (a) all 4 OpenCode entries exist in AI_PROVIDERS, (b) each has distinct alias (oc, ocg, ocz, ocp), (c) PROVIDER_MODELS has entries for all 4, (d) executors map has entries for opencode, opencode-go, opencode-zen, opencode-provider.
acceptance_criteria: Four separate OpenCode provider entries exist: opencode (Free), opencode-go (Go), opencode-zen (Zen), opencode-provider (Provider)
Each OpenCode variant has a unique alias: oc, ocg, ocz, ocp
Each variant has its own executor registered in open-sse/executors/index.ts
Each variant has a model list in providerModels.ts
New test passes: npm run test -- opencode-provider-variants
